info.title: AIESS Analytics Tools
info.description: Energy monitoring, TGE pricing, chart generation, and rule history tools for the AIESS Energy Core agent.

get.description: Retrieves real-time battery status including SoC, PCS power, grid power, PV power, load, and the currently active rule from the last 2 minutes of telemetry data.
Retrieves aggregated energy statistics (averages of SoC, PCS power, grid power, PV power, load) for a specified time period. Auto-selects the optimal data bucket for the time range.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back. Defaults to 24.

get.description: Retrieves TGE (Polish energy exchange) electricity prices. When hours is 0 or not provided, returns only the latest spot price in PLN/MWh and PLN/kWh. When hours is provided and greater than 0, returns both the current price and hourly price history for that period.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours of price history to include. Omit or 0 for latest price only.

price_pln_mwh.description: Current price in PLN per MWh.

price_pln_kwh.description: Current price in PLN per kWh.

get.description: Retrieves rule history. Returns both config snapshots (what rules were configured in the shadow) and active rule execution history (which rule was actually running on the device firmware). Use type parameter to request only config, only active, or both. Always call this before speculating about which rule was active.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back. Defaults to 24.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: History type: config, active, or both. Defaults to both.

get.description: Generates labeled datasets with time-series data points for visualization. Returns data formatted for line or bar charts. Available fields: grid_power, pcs_power, soc, total_pv_power, compensated_power. Use this when the user wants to see visual trends.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated field names: grid_power, pcs_power, soc, total_pv_power, compensated_power.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back. Defaults to 24.

parameters.name: chart_type
parameters.description: Chart type: line or bar. Defaults to line.

200.description: Chart data with datasets and labels.
